title: ICanGamez Resources
description:
This is for Devs to use these pixel art, in their minecraft mods and datapacks! 
This is a library of assets
body:
# ICanGamez Resources
This is a library full of old pixel art I made for the datapacks, free to use with credits to the author! Putting this just in your resourcepack folder will not work, this is for people who want to make stuff but can't make pixel art.


<details>
<summary>How to use?</summary>

Use the assets by extracting the .zip file and going through the folders.
select the assets you want and copy them over to your resource pack or modifications!
If you suspect you have an old copy of the resources just look at the version in the 
READ ME folder!

</details>


<details>
<summary>Why should you get this?</summary>
There are plenty of assets but here are a few reason that makes this resource different!
  
- It stays true to vanilla
- Repeatable Block Textures
- Colorful Textures
- Easy to find textures
- Armor Textures for custom trims
- Unused assets

</details>
